arts.ttl: Tamworth v Tottenham already 'part of town history'
arts.sum: Tamworth boss Andy Peaks says Sunday's FA Cup third-round tie with Tottenham has already become part of the town's history.

arts.ttl: Agent says Daniel Levy personally convinced player’s camp on January transfer to Tottenham
arts.sum: Tottenham youngster Antonín Kinský was convinced to join Spurs this month personally by chairman Daniel Levy. That’s according to his agent, Viktor Kolář, who has revealed all today via MF DNES about the youngster after his flying start to life in England. 21-year-old Kinský joined Tottenham in a €16.5m deal from Slavia Prague on January The post Agent says Daniel Levy personally convinced player’s camp on January transfer to Tottenham appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou welcomes lack of VAR for Tottenham’s FA Cup trip to Tamworth
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has been a vocal critic of VAR throughout his time in English football.

arts.ttl: “He gives you everything” – Manager says signing from Tottenham is ‘one of the secrets’ of success
arts.sum: Marseille manager Roberto De Zerbi has hailed summer signing Pierre Emile Hojbjerg as key to his success this season after arriving from Tottenham. RMC Sport cover comments from the Italian boss today in which he praises the Denmark midfielder’s performances so far this season. arts.ttl: Picture: Lautaro Martinez spurs Inter to stick ‘together’
arts.sum: Inter captain Lautaro Martinez wanted to share a motivational message after their painful Supercoppa Italiana...

arts.ttl: Who is Tom Tonks? Tamworth’s long throw weapon set to trouble Tottenham
arts.sum: The non-league Rory Delap has caused havoc so far in the FA Cup with a long throw that is ‘more dangerous than a corner’

arts.ttl: Latest team news from Ange Postecoglou, including game time for Mikey Moore and the chance to rest players
arts.sum: Ange was also asked if he was conscious of the need to rest the likes of Dejan Kulusevski, Dominic Solanke and Pedro Porro - Deki has appeared in all 30 of our matches so far this season, Dominic 26 and Pedro 25 - and if this tie against the National League side was an opportunity to do that, and he responded: "Yes, to a certain extent, but we have to be mindful that we don't want to turn into a tricky game for us, we want to make sure we play our best. Ange gave us an update on Rodrigo Bentacur's fitness earlier on Friday, and relayed the following information on the midfielder when asked about our team news going into the weekend.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals who will start in goal in Man United's mouth-watering FA Cup clash with Arsenal after Altay Bayindir came under fire in Carabao Cup defeat by Tottenham
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Head coach Ruben Amorim has revealed who will start in goal for Manchester United in their FA Cup third tie at Arsenal on Sunday in north London.

arts.ttl: Spurs Legends to face AC Milan Glorie in aid of Tottenham Hotspur Foundation
arts.sum: Supporters will have the option of making an additional donation of either £5, £10 or £20 to the Tottenham Hotspur Foundation as part of the ticket purchase process online. Tottenham Hotspur Foundation is the Club’s official charitable body, inspiring and empowering thousands of people living within our local communities through programmes spanning football and multi-sports, health and wellbeing, employability and education.

arts.ttl: Barcelona ‘say goodbye’ to Tottenham market opportunity
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have bid farewell to what was considered by the club to be a real opportunity on the transfer market. That’s according to Mundo…
